Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Error in posting Gl entry
entry.content: Dear user

entry.title: Re: Error in posting Gl entry
entry.content: Dear user, currently I am working on a S4 hana

entry.title: Re: FI-AA: Asset below-zero value
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

You're getting the error AA548 when trying to run depreciation in AFAB. That usually means SAP is trying to post accounting entries for depreciation but something is missing or misconfigured in the background specifically, in the setup of how asset accounting connects to the general ledger.

The message says there's a problem with the line item schema SAP_500_724. That schema controls what accounting entries are created during depreciation. If something is missing, like a GL account, the system can't generate the journal entries and throws this error.

Here's what you can check:

1. Account Determination (AO90)
Go to transaction AO90 and check if the right GL accounts are assigned for your asset class and depreciation areas. Make sure there are accounts for:

    • Asset acquisition
    • Depreciation expense
    • Accumulated depreciation

 

2. Asset Master Data (AS03)
Look at the asset you're depreciating. Make sure:

    • It has the right asset class
    • The depreciation area is active and correctly set up
    • It uses a valid depreciation key

 

3. Run AFAB in test mode
Try running the depreciation with test run + detailed log. SAP will usually show you which asset or account is causing the problem.

 

4. S/4HANA-specific
If you're on S/4HANA, make sure your depreciation expense accounts are also set up as secondary cost elements, since they now post to both FI and CO.

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: How to change GL account after Supplier invoice is po...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

Once a supplier invoice is posted, you can’t just go in and change the G/L account—it’s locked in. But there are a few ways to fix it depending on your situation:

1. Reverse and Repost (cleanest way)

If the invoice hasn’t been paid yet, the best option is to reverse it and post it again with the correct G/L account.

  • Use the “Manage Supplier Invoices” app or transaction FB08 (if you have access to the GUI).
  • Once reversed, create a new invoice with the correct account.

 

2. Post a Manual Journal Entry

If the invoice is already paid or you don’t want to reverse it, you can post a manual journal entry to move the amount from the wrong G/L to the right one.

  • Go to “Post General Journal Entries”
  • Debit the incorrect account and credit the correct one (or vice versa, depending on what happened).

This way, your financials are corrected, even if the original invoice stays as-is.

 

3. Use a Credit Memo and Repost

If you want to keep everything vendor-related clean:

  • Post a credit memo to cancel out the original invoice.
  • Then post a new invoice with the correct G/L account.

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Why the expiry date of SF "Certified Professional" in...
entry.content:
Hi,

I have the same issue as well that my Professional certifications show as "Expired" in Credly. They are not visible in "https://learning.sap.com/my-learning/certifications" as well. One of my colleague had reached out to SAP and their reply was that the SF Professional qualification will be valid until the Associate certification is active. The SAP Development Team is working on a solution to bring the professional level qualification as well on SAP Learning (LCS) and the professional certification validity will be extended before the expiration date. There is no solution to this yet. In addition, almost everyone with Professional certification/s I know is facing this issue.

entry.title: Re: Eclipse ADT crashes by splash screen on Mac due to eclipse.ini "--module-path..."
entry.content: The note 2971147 asks to check the current Java version, but you say you "added long time ago". So, what is your CURRENT Java version?

entry.title: No of container not reflecting in recurring inspection
entry.content:
While doing GRN against  purchase order there is option to enter No of containers (ANZGEB) under quantity tab and also while creating manual inspection lot for 09 inspection type under origin tab we again have a field to enter No of containers but when inspection lot is created through job through QA07 and also it is scheduled in background we don't have option to enter no of containers. 

 

Business requirement is what ever value is entered for No of containers for the Batch at the time of 101 goods receipt against purchase order that value should come automatically for No of containers (ANZGEB) against each batch while creating inspection lot through QA07.

entry.title: Re: SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework
entry.content: Thank you @Rene_de_Daniel !

entry.title: CAP bookshop sample, fixing the translation editor for localizations
entry.content:
When using CAP with NodeJS runtime, you may have been in contact with the "bookshop sample" over the years. This is also generated as complete sample application in your project folder, when you run

cds add sample

on the command line.

You may have noticed, that in the UI on the object (detail) page for a book, in the "Translations" section it is currently not possible to add another localization line with a locale, title and description for further languages. There is no data available as value help and whatever you enter as locale in the draft is not accepted:

If you leave it empty, you can save the draft, but then you have no locale for your new entry and also this can not be edited afterwards:

To be honest, I was a bit surprised, that this sample, which SAP uses in many tutorials / learning courses and included in the CDS tooling to be generated as sample, shows such a basic deficiency.

The reasons seems to be, that this sample was developed earlier for OData V2 and not migrated cleanly over time to OData V4. The main problem in the file ‎app/admin-books/fiori-service.cds is the following line, which is not valid anymore in OData V4:

locale @(ValueList.entity: 'Languages', Common.ValueListWithFixedValues)

The fixes seem to be relatively simple. In the file ‎app/admin-books/fiori-service.cds you add in the header:

using {sap} from '@sap/cds/common';
using from '@sap/cds-common-content';

The locale annotation block has to be replaced.
Old:

// Add Value Help for Locales
annotate AdminService.Books.texts {
  locale @(rvice.c
    ValueList.entity: 'Languages',
    Common.ValueListWithFixedValues, //show as drop down, not a dialog
  )
};o OData

New: ValueL

// Add Value Help for Locales
annotate AdminService.Books.texts with {
  locale @(
    Common.FieldControl : #Mandatory,
    Common.ValueListWithFixedValues,
    Common.ValueList : {
      $Type         : 'Common.ValueListType',
      CollectionPath: 'Languages',
      Parameters    : [
        { $Type            : 'Common.ValueListParameterInOut',
          LocalDataProperty: locale,
          ValueListProperty: 'code' },
        { $Type            : 'Common.ValueListParameterDisplayOnly',
          ValueListProperty: 'descr' }
      ]
    }
  );
};

In package.json in the dependencies, you will have to add "@sap/cds-common-content": "^2.1.0", like:

"dependencies": {
  "@sap/cds": "^8",
  "@sap/cds-common-content": "^2.1.0",
  "express": "^4"
},

This can be done on the command line with:

npm add @sap/cds-common-content --save

This will show all language / country codes currently defined in the cds-common package as value help for the locale field:

If you select 'es' and add some text, after saving the draft, you will see:

If you do not want to see all predefined languages / country codes and want to override it with a selection of your choice, you can add a table as CSV in the db/data folder under the name db/data/sap.common-Languages.csv for example with this content:

code;descr
de;Deutsch
en;English
fr;Français
es;Español
it;Italiano

Hoping this helps - and hoping SAP will fix their sample code generated by the cds tool as well.
(Sorry for some strange characters and formattings in this post, but it could not be fixed using the buggy WYSIWYG editor)

entry.title: SAP Continous Integration & Delivery - Branch with pattern not working
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We have a job in our SAP CI/CD instance which is supposed to be triggered on all the branches starting by feature. For this, we have followed the nomenclature feature*. Configuration screenshot as follows:

Unfortunately, when developers are pushing code to their respective feature branches the job is not triggered.

Based on this video tutorial, this should be possible but it is not working for us.

https://www.sap.com/assetdetail/2023/11/fa4748fb-967e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

Any idea what we may be missing?

Thanks,

C.

entry.title: Re: SAP Continous Integration & Delivery - Branch with pa...
entry.content:
Sorted. Our feature branches are named with slashes.

Based on the documentation we need to use ** if we want to include slashes.

https://help.sap.com/docs/continuous-integration-and-delivery/sap-continuous-integration-and-delivery/configure-multi-branch-job?language=en-US&q=branch

Changing the branch name to feature** solved our issue.

Thanks,

C.

entry.content:

I am referring to above SAP notes and the symptoms are same, I have tried fixing issues with skill mapping with role

entry.title: Purchase requisition XXXX cannot be released

What's the issue here? What need to be checked here?

entry.title: Error in CJI3 FIELD error in CJI3 FIELD MBGBTR - Total amount recorded
entry.content:
A client reported that the quantities from the recorded material document are not being displayed in the Total Amount Recorded (MBGBTR) field.
The case was reviewed and the following was observed:
The report is not generating the volumetric value (Total Amount Recorded (MBGBTR) field - CJI3) because the data is not being received from the MM module. This was verified by reviewing the COEP table, and the record is not displayed, and therefore is not shown in the report.
Does anyone have any clue as to why this situation is occurring?
Thank you for your support.

entry.title: Re: F-92 Asset Retirement Check Box is missing
entry.content: perfect ans

entry.title: Re: Question about SF ATS adoption in China
entry.content: We had similar situation at our end and were advised internally and externally (including SAP) not to use global instance (hosted outside of China) of recruitment module for China. in other words, it is recommended that customers use SAP data center in China if they want to SF recruitment module for China. For now we process recruitment related activities outside of SF for China and hire employees directly in EC. Next year we will look at the option of using SAP data center in China for recruitment activities and integrating this with our global instance in EU for non recruitment related activities.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Melbourne - 21th May 2025

@jkmaeda711 , very sorry missed this post.

Would we be able to hold the Aug event at 7 - Eleven corporate office ? We are hoping to have this event on the 20th Aug. Would this work for you all ?

Thank you very much for offering to host this event. Greatly appreciated.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Melbourne - 20th Aug 2025
entry.content:
Hi SAP Melbourne Community,

Come and join us for the 3rd SAP Inside Track for this year 2025 

Date: 20th Aug 2025

Time : 6pm to 9pm

Location: TBA

Note : Please bring your ID card

Agenda :

6.00pm – Catchup with Community ( Drinks will be served)

6.30pm– Topic 1

7pm – Topic 2

7.30 pm – Catchup with SAP Community (Drinks and Pizza will be served)

8.30 pm – Wrap up

Thankyou!

See you there

Cheers,

SAP Community

@pjcools, @Machillanda @BenPatterson @Saikrishna_Sriram

entry.title: Action is not Trigger, When I call from Script type Event Handler.
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a button labeled "Call Co-Owner", and on click, I’m invoking a Script-type Event Handler. Within the script, I’m attempting to trigger an Action button and update a specific field with the value "One".

However, it appears that the Action is not being triggered as expected.

Could you please help me understand why the action might not be firing, or suggest any steps I can take to resolve this?

This is the Event Handler Script.

This is the Action I have to call 

Please help me. What things am I doing wrong?

 

C4C Service SAP Cloud Applications Studio SAP Cloud Application Programming Model C4C Sales C4C Extensibility SAP enhancement package for SAP CRM

entry.title: Moving Forward
entry.content:
Dear SAP Business One community

Today I want to talk about how you could with a few simple actions, copy specific lines or complete documents within the web client.

Let’s look at this video to learn more.

You can find additional information in the SAP Business One Web client user guide and the Learning journey.

Regards

Ari

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting Indicator in 'Change Maintenance Order...
entry.content:
Hi Riyaz,

For Public Cloud Edition, external refurbishment through subcontracting feature is planned for Q2/2026.

For Private Cloud Edition, activate below business functions -

LOG_EAM_ROTSUB
LOG_EAM_ROTSUB_2
LOG_MM_SERNO

Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: Hide ALV toolbar icons after refresh table display
entry.content:
Experts, 

I am displaying ALV using method set_table_for_first_display. I am excluding toolbar icons using it_toolbar_excluding  parameter in this method. Button EDIT has been added in application toolbar to allow users to select one or more rows and edit the data. Event handle_change_finished has been used to  call method refresh table display to reflect the edited data in ALV. When this method is called, I see that standard ALV toolbar with append, insert and delete row icons is shown. I want to exclude these icons but don't see a way to influence this in refresh table display method call. I found an old SCN thread where they had suggested to call method set_table_for_first_display again instead of refresh table display. I highlight the cells in the rows selected for editing. This highlighting works fine only when I use refresh table display and doesn't work when I use set table display method. So I believe I have to go with refresh table display method to meet my requirement. 
Can you please let me know if its possible to hide the standard ALV icons after refresh table display method call? Is there any other better approach to handle this. I don't want users to have access to icons which are not relevant to them. 

*******Code to display ALV
    me->exclude_alv_toolbar( ).

    CALL METHOD go_grid->register_edit_event
      EXPORTING
        i_event_id = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_evt_enter.

    CALL METHOD go_grid->set_table_for_first_display
      EXPORTING
        is_layout            = value lvc_s_layo( sel_mode = 'A' stylefname = 'CELLTAB' ctab_fname = 'CELLCOLOR' no_rowmark = abap_false )
        it_toolbar_excluding = gt_exclude
      CHANGING
        it_fieldcatalog      = gt_fieldcat
        it_outtab            = gt_final.

    SET HANDLER me->handle_top_of_page FOR go_grid.
    SET HANDLER me->handle_change_finished FOR go_grid.

    CALL METHOD cl_gui_cfw=>flush.

*******Code to handle sy-ucomm for EDIT button in PAI
MODULE user_command_0100 INPUT.
  CASE sy-ucomm.
    WHEN 'BACK' OR 'EXIT' OR 'CANCEL'.
      LEAVE PROGRAM.
    WHEN 'EDIT'.
      lo_cashdesk->edit_records( ).
    WHEN 'SAVE'.
      lo_cashdesk->save_edit_data( ).
    WHEN 'UNDO'.
      lo_cashdesk->undo_edit_data( ).
  ENDCASE.
ENDMODULE.

********Method called when user clicks EDIT button 
 METHOD edit_records.
    DATA lv_valid TYPE c.
    DATA lt_row_no     TYPE lvc_t_roid.
    DATA lt_stylerow TYPE lvc_t_styl.
    DATA ls_stylerow TYPE lvc_s_styl.
    DATA lt_cellcolor TYPE lvc_t_scol.
    DATA ls_cellcolor TYPE lvc_s_scol.
    DATA ls_stable TYPE lvc_s_stbl.

    CLEAR lt_row_no.
    CALL METHOD go_grid->get_selected_rows
      IMPORTING
        et_row_no = lt_row_no.

    IF NOT lt_row_no IS INITIAL.
      LOOP AT gt_final ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_final>).
        READ TABLE lt_row_no ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_row_no>) WITH KEY row_id = sy-tabix.
        IF sy-subrc = 0.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'TOTAL'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'REC_NO'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'NAME'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'ELECRTICITY'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'ELECRTICITY'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'FRESH_WATER'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'FRESH_WATER'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'SALT_WATER'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'SALT_WATER'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'INST_FEE'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'INST_FEE'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'LABOUR_FEE'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'LABOUR_FEE'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'FINE'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'FINE'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'BALDIAH'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'BALDIAH'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'SEC_DEPO'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'SEC_DEPO'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'PAYON_ACC'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'PAYON_ACC'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'CON_CHARGE'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'CON_CHARGE'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'R'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
        ELSE.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'TOTAL'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'REC_NO'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'NAME'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'ELECRTICITY'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'FRESH_WATER'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'SALT_WATER'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'INST_FEE'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'LABOUR_FEE'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'FINE'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'BALDIAH'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'SEC_DEPO'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'PAYON_ACC'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'CON_CHARGE'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'R'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
        ENDIF.
        CLEAR: <lfs_final>-celltab, <lfs_final>-cellcolor.
        TRY.
            INSERT LINES OF lt_stylerow INTO TABLE <lfs_final>-celltab.
          CATCH cx_sy_itab_duplicate_key.
        ENDTRY.
        TRY.
            INSERT LINES OF lt_cellcolor INTO TABLE <lfs_final>-cellcolor.
          CATCH cx_sy_itab_duplicate_key.
        ENDTRY.
        CLEAR: lt_stylerow, ls_stylerow, lt_cellcolor, ls_cellcolor.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDIF.

    go_grid->check_changed_data( ).
    IF go_grid->is_ready_for_input( ) EQ 0.
      CALL METHOD go_grid->set_ready_for_input
        EXPORTING
          i_ready_for_input = 1.
    ENDIF.
    ls_stable-row = abap_true.
    ls_stable-col = abap_true.
    CALL METHOD go_grid->refresh_table_display
      EXPORTING
        is_stable = ls_stable
      EXCEPTIONS
        finished  = 1
        OTHERS    = 2.

  ENDMETHOD.

*******Method handle change finished
METHOD handle_change_finished.
    DATA ls_stable TYPE lvc_s_stbl.
    IF et_good_cells IS NOT INITIAL.
      APPEND LINES OF et_good_cells TO gt_good_cells.
      LOOP AT et_good_cells INTO DATA(ls_good_cells) GROUP BY ls_good_cells-row_id.
        READ TABLE gt_final ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_final>) INDEX ls_good_cells-row_id.
        IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
          LOOP AT et_good_cells INTO DATA(ls_good_cells_value) WHERE row_id = ls_good_cells-row_id.
            CASE ls_good_cells_value-fieldname.
              WHEN 'ELECRTICITY'.
                <lfs_final>-elecrticity = <lfs_final>-elecrticity / 10.
              WHEN 'FRESH_WATER'.
                <lfs_final>-fresh_water = <lfs_final>-fresh_water / 10.
              WHEN 'OTHER'.
                <lfs_final>-other = <lfs_final>-other / 10.
              WHEN 'INST_FEE'.
                <lfs_final>-inst_fee = <lfs_final>-inst_fee / 10.
              WHEN 'LABOUR_FEE'.
                <lfs_final>-labour_fee = <lfs_final>-labour_fee / 10.
              WHEN 'FINE'.
                <lfs_final>-fine = <lfs_final>-fine / 10.
              WHEN 'BALDIAH'.
                <lfs_final>-baldiah = <lfs_final>-baldiah / 10.
              WHEN 'SEC_DEPO'.
                <lfs_final>-sec_depo = <lfs_final>-sec_depo / 10.
              WHEN 'SALT_WATER'.
                <lfs_final>-salt_water = <lfs_final>-salt_water / 10.
              WHEN 'PAYON_ACC'.
                <lfs_final>-payon_acc = <lfs_final>-payon_acc / 10.
              WHEN 'CON_CHARGE'.
                <lfs_final>-con_charge = <lfs_final>-con_charge / 10.
              WHEN OTHERS.
            ENDCASE.
          ENDLOOP.
          <lfs_final>-total = <lfs_final>-elecrticity + <lfs_final>-fresh_water + <lfs_final>-salt_water + <lfs_final>-inst_fee +
                              <lfs_final>-labour_fee + <lfs_final>-other + <lfs_final>-payon_acc + <lfs_final>-fine + <lfs_final>-con_charge.
        ENDIF.
      ENDLOOP.
      ls_stable-row = abap_true.
      ls_stable-col = abap_true.
      CALL METHOD go_grid->refresh_table_display
        EXPORTING
          is_stable = ls_stable
        EXCEPTIONS
          finished  = 1
          OTHERS    = 2.
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.

 I have attached images of initial ALV display where I have successfully hidden icons on ALV toolbar. 2nd attachment shows ALV with standard ALV tool bar icons which is shown after user selects a row and clicks EDIT icon. 

IMG # 1: Initial ALV display where I have hidden the icons using it_toolbar_excluding parameter

IMG # 2: ALV toolbar with standard icons displayed after refresh table display method call

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: How to use .where() multiple times while working with projection functions, CQL, OData?
entry.content:
Hello team,
I have following Odata query which works fine in Postman. Now I have to implement same logic in CAP.
.com/odata/v4/OPPS/BusinessUnitAssignments?$filter=(businessUnitID eq '1234')&$expand=promotion($filter=statusCode ne 'AC' and filterBuId eq 'CZP1%7C2B';$expand=promotionPriceDerivationRules($select=priceDerivationRuleID)) 

Here we need to expand promotion but only include promotions that match statusCode='AC' and filterBuId='CZP1|2B'

As you can see in query, we have to use 2 times expand, hence joined query with "semicolon". But in first expand we must use $filter, but in the beginning of query, we have already used $filter.
In CAP, $filter == .where()
How to use .where() clause in this situation?
Please support. Thanks.
Ex- This below snippet examples works fine but now how to use statusCode and filterBuId

            const results = await remote.run(
                SELECT.from(BusinessUnitAssignments)
                    .columns(b => {
                        b.businessUnitID,
                        b.promotion(p => {
                            p.promotionID,
                            p.promotionPriceDerivationRules(r => {
                                r.promotionPriceDerivationRuleID
                            })
                        })
                    })
                    .where({
                        businessUnitID: CustomerID,
                    })
            );

@vvdries @gregorw @qmacro

entry.title: Application Development using FHIR
entry.content:
FHIR is not just about interoperability and means of compliance measures, but much more beyond. Unleash healthcare applications using FHIR. Here is why and how…

🔥 Extensibility: FHIR is designed to be extensible, allowing developers to adapt it to specific needs. SAP Health Data Services for FHIR leverages this with a metadata-driven architecture, making it easier to extend and configure applications to meet evolving business needs and healthcare regulations.
🔥 Security: FHIR incorporates security specifications and best practices. SAP Health Data Services for FHIR builds upon this, providing a secure foundation for healthcare applications, integrated with SAP BTP services.
🔥 Interoperability: FHIR's core purpose is to facilitate interoperability in healthcare. It provides specifications for APIs and information exchange, enabling seamless integration with systems within a hospital landscape via FHIR-enabled communication servers.
🔥 Analytics: FHIR's structured data and API access make it suitable for integration with analytics platforms.
🔥 Ease of building applications: SAP Health Data Services for FHIR, built on FHIR, simplifies application development with built-in APIs, persistency, a configurable domain model, and cloud qualities. It offers convenient, content-driven development mechanisms, reducing development time and operational effort.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi everyone! I’m Lance, thrilled to be here and eager to learn, share, and grow with this amazing community!

entry.title: Re: SAC Modeler - load data into a model - defines blank...
entry.content: Thank you so much for your help!

entry.title: Service in IDES instance is not reachable
entry.content:
I got myself an IDES instance on cal.sap.com because I wanted to try out some built-in OData service to handle production orders. It seems that the services are configured correctly:

- In transaction SICF under the default_host node there are services, and they are all activated
- In transaction SMICM the ICM is up and running without any obvious problems
- When I switch to ICM -> services, I can see that the port is 0 and the host name is set to a dummy value
- When I try to change port / host there it says "Service HTPP... can not be started" but its already running.
- Trying to adjust host parameters in RZ11 didn't change anything

Can anyone give me hot tip what else to check?

entry.title: Re: HCI : How to call multiple API'S and Combine into a single message
entry.content: You can follow either of the process( depends on the requirement ) and I am assuming you don't have any input data based on which you need to query.    Based on the above requirement what if I have any input assume input coming from sap --> cpi SFSF -->SAP. May I know the how we can proceed with this kind of requirement

entry.title: Cust (ONB) Custom Onboarding Task Initiated/Completed Template- not sent according to user's locale
entry.content:
Hi,

I’ve created copies of both the (ONB) Custom Onboarding Task Initiated Template and the (ONB) Custom Onboarding Task Completed Template notifications. However, unlike the (ONB) Prepare for New Team Member Template notification, these two notifications are not being sent according to the user’s locale.

Could you please advise on how to resolve this issue?

Thank you!

Best regards,
Lital

entry.title: Learning Hub Partner Edition - Four attempts for certification
entry.content:
Hi colleagues!

Not so long ago we bought a SAP Learning Hub Subscription - Partner Edition so one of our consultants can take the assessment and comply with the Stay Certified program. 

We're seeing that after he activated the subscription 4 attempts were made available. Today we bought one more license for another consultant and was activated successfully. My question is:

Are the 4 attempts per user or global for all user licenses that we acquire?

For example:
2 Users = 4 attempts per user = 8 attempts in total.

2 Users or more = 4 attempts in total.

In my understanding the attempts should be per user and not limited to 4 globally. Am I correct about this?

Thanks in advance for your help!

Kind regards!

I entered a Delivery address at the component level in the Pm Order, see image below, but the address is not copying into the Outbound Delivery, Kindly advice what is missing or is this feature not yet available.

thanks for the great blog and advice.

Fernando

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting Indicator in 'Change Maintenance Order...
entry.content: Thanks VijayGS - All three BFs are activated in my private cloud system, still no luck as you can see below screenshot, 'Subcontracting' tick box is not visible.

entry.title: Stated Amount Including Input Tax - Manage service entry sheet - lean service app
entry.content:
Dear all,
When creating a service entry sheet using the "Manage Service Entry Sheet – Lean Services" app, I enter a tax code of 5%. However, I want the system to calculate the "Stated Amount Including Input Tax" by adding the tax amount to the "Stated Amount".
For example:

  • Stated Amount = 100 USD

  • Tax (5%) = 5 USD

  • Expected "Stated Amount Including Input Tax" = 105 USD

Currently, the system does not add the tax amount to the stated amount.
How can I configure or enter data so that the tax is added to the stated amount to reflect the total including input tax, as required by our customer?

entry.title: Re: Indian Accounting Standards Day: S/4HANA Empowers Compliance and Financial Transformation
entry.content:
Thanks Srinath

 Very informative and insightful

entry.title: Re: Hide ALV toolbar icons after refresh table display
entry.content: Please embed the images, otherwise everyone has to click each image one by one, and they are displayed separately from the question.

entry.title: Re: Change Management - Change record in SAP S/4 HANA 2023
entry.content: @rvarulselvan I am facing an issue — when I create a change record, it gets created, but the system does not generate a change number. Could you please help me identify the issue?

entry.title: Re: Hide ALV toolbar icons after refresh table display
entry.content:
I guess it's because you call set_ready_for_input( 1 ) after pressing the button which makes the buttons appear.

Move the call before set_table_for_first_display and set the styles of all cells to mc_style_disabled.

You may also not call the method at all, pass EDIT = 'X' instead:

is_layout            = value lvc_s_layo( edit = 'X' ...

NB: your code is difficult to read concerning the change of styles, I suggest this writing (EDIT 2 hours later: color logic adjusted with "row_is_to_be_edited"):

DATA(names_of_editable_fields) = VALUE string_table( ( `ELECRTICITY` )
                                                     ( `FRESH_WATER` )
                                                     ( `SALT_WATER` )
                                                     ( `INST_FEE` )
                                                     ( `LABOUR_FEE` )
                                                     ( `FINE` )
                                                     ( `BALDIAH` )
                                                     ( `SEC_DEPO` )
                                                     ( `PAYON_ACC` )
                                                     ( `CON_CHARGE` ) ).
LOOP AT gt_final ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_final>).
  DATA(row_is_to_be_edited) = COND abap_bool( WHEN line_exists( lt_row_no[ row_id = index_of_alv_row ] )
                                              THEN abap_true 
                                              ELSE abap_false ).
  LOOP AT names_of_editable_fields ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fieldname>).
    <lfs_final>-celltab   = VALUE #( ( fieldname = <fieldname>
                                       style     = COND #( WHEN row_is_to_be_edited = abap_true
                                                           THEN cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled
                                                           ELSE cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled ) ) ).
    <lfs_final>-cellcolor = COND #( WHEN row_is_to_be_edited = abap_true
                                    THEN VALUE #( ( fname     = <fieldname>
                                                    color-col = 6 ) ) ).
   ENDLOOP.
ENDLOOP.

Also, the "FS" part of field symbol names <LFS...> is useless, it's obvious that <...> is a field symbol.

NB: catching duplicate lines of INSERT is useless because your code doesn't pass duplicate lines so the exception will never happen.

entry.title: Re: Hide ALV toolbar icons after refresh table display
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

Thank you so much for your reply.

1) I have removed the img attachments and embedded them to the thread body.

2) Insert statement - catching duplicates is useless. Agreed. Thanks for the call out. I have changed the code now.

3) "FS" part of field symbol names <LFS...> is useless - Agreed. I picked it up somewhere long back in one of my clients as part of their ABAP naming convention docu. Been doing it for many yrs now. But your point makes total sense. Will change my approach.

4) My reqmt is to make all the rows display only. User will choose one or more rows to edit. Only those rows should be allowed for editing and the rest should be in display mode. I believe if I use value lvc_s_layo( edit = 'X' ... ) then the entire ALV rows will show up as editable.

5) Your code is difficult to read concerning the change of styles: I love your suggestion. Will implement the same. The code I have written comes from BCALV_EDIT_05.

Thanks Bharath

entry.title: Re: Hide ALV toolbar icons after refresh table display
entry.content: Hi

entry.title: Re: Hide ALV toolbar icons after refresh table display
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

Reason I don't want to open up the entire ALV output for editing is because users might fat finger the edit and change the incorrect report.

So I am restricting it with a display mode initially and then only highlight the selected row using red color.

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: Balancing field Profit Center in GL line item 0 not filled
entry.content:
Hi Expert

We are facing an error as “Balancing field "Profit Center" in GL line item 0 not filled”, while making down payment to supplier by “Post Outgoing Payment” APP.

The scenario is, we have made a purchase/service order in Plant GF01 and Profit Center GF0101 and then create down payment request with special G/L indicator “A” for the same. After that when we going to post down payment with respective purchase order from different profit center GH0101 which is related to Head Office then system giving the said error.

entry.title: Mandatory Data Types
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently importing employee data for a client that is migrating to SuccessFactors. We have had several iterations of the migration, and after the last iteration, the client decided not to import a certain type of data, Compensation Information.

Is it going to be possible to import the rest of the data without any issue or is it a mandatory field that must never be avoided, when importing employee data? Are there data types that are essential for data migration at all, without which the import of the rest of the data will not work, return an error etc.?

Kind regards,
A.

entry.title: Re: SAP standard authorization details for SAP Datasphere...
entry.content:
Hi, content does not contain authorizations. You need to create them based on the requirements

BDC Insight Apps do contain authorizations as well.

entry.title: I have patient name and consent forms in use like medical consent, photo consent.
entry.content: I can get total consents by patient by grouping by patient. Then how can I show how many medical consents, photo consents etc there are?

entry.title: Re: I have patient name and consent forms in use like med...
entry.content:
Here are 2 typical solutions:

  1. Insert a CrossTab
  2. Use a subreport

entry.title: Update of the Quick Start Guide "SAP and Quantum Computing"
entry.content:
Please check our Quick Start Guide SAP and Quantum Computing which has been updated with the new SAP related use case for Quantum Computing.

Organizations must balance cost efficiency, regulatory compliance, supply chain resilience, and environmental impact to comply sustainability regulations, stay competitive and profitable.

This use case is about transforming sustainability cost complexity into competitive advantage with Agentic AI and Quantum Computing.

Value proposition is to simultaneously optimize cost, emissions, supplier risk, and compliance by evaluating millions of material and supplier combinations, unlocking trade-offs that classical systems cannot handle.

Use case integrates:

  • Quantum Computing solving large-scale, multi-variable optimization problems in parallel, identifying the most efficient trade-offs, and solving the NP-hard problem
  • Agentic AI automating workflows, orchestrating decision-making, and delivering near-time, actionable insights
  • ERP-centric sustainability & business solutions aligning near-time sustainability metrics with financial and operational strategies for measurable impact

Check full list of our Quick Start Guides here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere user license overview
entry.content:
Hi,

In DSP you pay for Capacity Units, not licenses. Capacity units --> BTP? 

Users can be viewed under security. 

 

hope this helps, cheers, Martin

entry.title: Re: Ms SQL Server to Datasphere
entry.content: Hi, I would materialize / persist the results into a table on the MS SQL Side, then use replication flow to load the data into an inbound table on the DSP side. Cheers, Martin

entry.title: Re: SAP BAS CAPM debugging Uncaught Error Error: ENOSPC: System limit for number of file watchers re
entry.content: Hello - We have the same problem. We've added as suggested the "node_modules" to the watcher exclusion. We've also deactivtated the productivity tools. To no avail. We still have this problem all the time for larger models. Did you find a solution for this ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One Webclient Extension does not show
entry.content:
Hi Salim-Satiro,

You can find the step-by-step process for uploading an extension via the Extension Manager in the SAP Business One Web Client at the following link:
Uploading Extensions – SAP Help Portal

If you're still encountering issues after following these instructions, I recommend opening a support ticket for further assistance.

entry.title: Re: Hide ALV toolbar icons after refresh table display
entry.content: You're right, if you define as editable, the default cell styles are "enabled", hence you also need to set the initial cell styles to "disabled".

entry.title: Re: Mapas Fiscais Portugal - 33 - Reintegrações - Fiscal...
entry.content:
Hello @Crocha 

Thank you for your message.

You are correct that Portuguese asset revaluation involves specific statutory requirements (e.g., MAP 33), but SAP does not provide a dedicated scope item or standard documentation specifically for this process yet.

While Scope Item 2W2 refers to customer returns and is not related to asset revaluation, Portuguese revaluation can be managed in SAP using standard FI-AA functionality (e.g., transaction AR29N) along with customised depreciation areas and revaluation methods, supported by localisation settings in the Portuguese country version.

To ensure Alignment and compliance.

  • Activate the Portuguese country version in your system if you haven't done so.
  • Consider consulting local SAP partners for any required MAP 33-specific add-ons

Let me know if you need further assistance

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: I have patient name and consent forms in use like med...
entry.content: Thank you I couldn't remember! I last used cr in 2021

entry.title: Re: Balancing field Profit Center in GL line item 0 not f...
entry.content:
Hello @VPS80 

This error occurs because the profit center is a mandatory balancing field in S/4HANA Public Cloud. In your scenario, the profit center derived during down payment posting (GH0101) differs from that in the original purchase order (GF0101). The GL line item remains incomplete since the system cannot automatically derive or split the balancing entry.

Recommended Resolution:

Ensure consistency of profit center across all steps in the process:

  • Either post the down payment using the same profit center (GF0101) as the purchase order,
  • Or configure default profit center derivation in the Manage Substitution Rules for Journal Entries app (if business-justified and allowed in your tenant).

Note: In S/4HANA Public Cloud, customer-specific BAdI enhancements for profit center derivation are restricted.

Let me know if it solves your question

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: ITSM error in SOLMAN_SETUP T-Code
entry.content:
Hi Vinay,

Check this SAP note 2492792, it is applicable in your environment.

Regards

SS

entry.title: #SITSAL2025 - 🗣️ Tax Service: Arquitetura e Configuração
entry.content:
Fabio Dezan: Arquitetura e Configuração do Tax Service (SAP)

Palestrante: Fabio Dezan
Bio: Consultor especialista em soluções fiscais no SAP, Fabio é reconhecido por sua longa trajetória no ecossistema de tecnologia fiscal. Casado com Paula e pai de Alice, valoriza profundamente a família e o propósito pessoal em equilíbrio com a carreira. Atua na integração de soluções fiscais em ambientes complexos como SAP ECC e S/4HANA.
Título da palestra: #SITSAL2025 - Tax Service: Arquitetura e Configuração
Evento: SAP Inside Track Salvador 2025

Os pontos-chave da palestra de Fabio Dezan para você entender e assistir depois

O valor das raízes e da comunidade

Fabio abre sua palestra com uma reflexão pessoal e humana: o que realmente importa na vida são as pessoas e os vínculos — sua esposa Paula e a filha Alice. Com humildade, relembra sua primeira participação no evento em 2015, não como palestrante, mas como alguém que buscava contribuir. Isso reforça o valor da comunidade e da construção coletiva do conhecimento.

Evolução do cenário fiscal no SAP

A palestra mergulha na complexidade tributária brasileira e nos desafios enfrentados pelas empresas para automatizar e validar regras fiscais. Fabio mostra como o antigo modelo de cálculo de impostos no SAP, baseado em fórmulas como a 320 e soluções como TAXBRA, está sendo substituído por engines modernos de cálculo, externos ao SAP, que tornam o processo mais flexível e escalável.

O motor de cálculo como inteligência coletiva

A inovação trazida pelo Tax Service está não apenas na tecnologia, mas na forma como ela incorpora uma inteligência coletiva. Times de tributaristas analisam legislações, inserem amparos legais no sistema e esses dados passam a ser compartilhados por todos os clientes. Isso garante atualização constante e uma base confiável, sem que cada empresa precise reinventar a roda.

Integração em tempo real com parceiros fiscais

Ao contrário do que muitos imaginam, a comunicação entre o SAP e o motor de cálculo externo ocorre em tempo real. A apresentação traz casos concretos de grandes empresas brasileiras, como a Ambev, que utilizam a solução de forma fluida e sem comprometer a performance.

Simplificação da precificação e cadastro fiscal

Outro ponto forte da palestra é a ênfase na simplificação do cadastro fiscal. Em vez de múltiplos campos e condições complexas, Fabio mostra como um sistema moderno consegue calcular impostos com base em um número enxuto de condições — inclusive testando cenários históricos e simulando impactos com base em XMLs de notas já emitidas.

O futuro da área fiscal nas empresas

Fabio reforça que o papel do consultor SAP está em transformação. É preciso entender de integração, cloud, APIs e arquiteturas descentralizadas. Ao adotar soluções como o Tax Service, empresas ganham não só em compliance fiscal, mas em estratégia, agilidade e competitividade.

se você deseja ser notificado sobre os próximos eventos SAP Inside Track no Brasil, entre na nossa lista de interesse: Cadastre-se aqui para ser notificado

entry.title: SAP Sapphire Orlando 2025: Building the future of finance with SAP Taulia!
entry.content:
Get to know me 👋

Hi SAP Community. My name is Thomas Mehlkopf, and I’m the General Manager and Head of Working Capital Management at SAP Taulia.

At SAP Taulia, I am committed to shaping the future of finance by leveraging my extensive background in finance and technology. My mission is to deliver innovative, customer-centric solutions that drive growth and transformation.

The integration and expansion of Taulia within SAP has significantly enhanced our value proposition for the office of the CFO by enabling customers to unlock liquidity and accelerate cash flow, while continuing to ensure the resilience of the supply chain.  As the head of the Working Capital Management and Treasury Center of Excellence, I champion strategic innovation and seamless integration to support enterprise-wide decision-making.

  

My Sapphire Orlando sessions 💡

This year, I’m proud to host three sessions at #SAPSapphire, where we’ll explore how AI-driven optimization is transforming everything from cash management to enterprise decision-making. In a world where agility and transparency are more critical than ever, we’ll examine how leading organizations are enhancing profitability, unlocking trapped cash, and building more resilient, data-driven enterprises. I’m especially excited to hear from customers who are turning insight into value and to connect with peers across the ecosystem who are driving innovation forward.

 

1️⃣LIVE: Unlock the future of cash management with AI-driven optimization - FIM2196

Tuesday, May 20, 1:30 PM - 1:50 PM EDT

Unlock the power of connected data, including SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and third-party data, using the SAP Business Data Cloud solution. You can gain unprecedented, holistic insights into your working capital, enabling smarter financial decisions and helping you drive a comprehensive working capital strategy across your enterprise. Register now.

 

2️⃣LIVE: Get a holistic view of your working capital across your enterprise - ERP2586

Wednesday, May 21, 2:30 PM - 2:50 PM EDT

Discover how SAP Business Suite, enabled by SAP Taulia and SAP Business Data Cloud solutions and cutting-edge AI, can revolutionize your cash management strategies. Find out how to transform your payables and receivables to enhance cash flow and profitability. Register now.

 

3️⃣WEBINAR: Key Takeaways from Sapphire 2025 for Finance & Treasury Leaders

Wednesday, June 11, 10:00 AM EDT

Join me and Anders Liu-Lindberg, Partner and Chief Commercial Officer at Business Partnering Institute, and special guests for an expert-led webinar as we unpack key takeaways from Sapphire 2025—and how to turn them into action for your organization. Register now.

The sessions will provide attendees with an opportunity to learn from best-in-class stories, hear innovative strategies in action, and gain insights into optimizing working capital management, empowering them to rethink their approach and build a future-proof strategy that drives sustained growth and operational efficiency.

 

Additional SAP Taulia sessions 🚀

If you’re looking to learn more about SAP’s finance roadmap, check out my colleague, Danielle Weinblatt, Taulia’s CPO, session on how this roadmap supports businesses in transforming business processes with innovations in ERP, data, and AI. Register now.

Join the SAP Taulia team in real-time and experience a live demo of our platform at our demo station. Manage liquidity, mitigate financial risks, and optimize working capital with SAP Taulia Working Capital Management solutions and instant payments that integrate seamlessly with SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP Business Data Cloud Intelligent Applications. Utilize AI tools to automate receivables processes, compare working capital strategies, and optimize for success. Demo station FIM2569.

We’re also hosting an exclusive roundtable, Insight to Value: The Future of the CFO in the Age of AI, on Tuesday, May 20 from 2:00–3:00 PM in Room S220C. This invitation-only session will gather senior finance leaders to explore how AI is transforming the CFO’s role and unlocking new sources of value.

Related community managed tags you should subscribe to remain informed about this topic: 

  • SAP Sapphire
  • SAP Business Suite
  • SAP Business Data Cloud
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
  • FIN (Finance)
  • FIN Cash Management
  • FIN Treasury
  • SAP Taulia

Now let’s hear from you! 💬

If you’re attending #SAPSapphire as Finance or Procurment expert, let me know what you are most looking forward to. Whether it is the Agentic AI use cases in Finance, data-driven decision making with BDC, how to self-fund transformation projects with SAP Taulia, cash management innovations or anything else, I’d love to hear what’s on your mind.

entry.title: Re: Row Grouping in Excel through ABAP OLE
entry.content: Hello, I've the same issue in 2025😄😄😄. Did you solve the problem yet?

entry.title: Changing per unit price in release PO
entry.content:
We have contract based on material markup price which is used to determine contract cost, so we needs to change to change the price in release PO from contract based on actual market price which is either below or above the markup price in the contract. so we needs your advise how to handle this

there are two cases

1. contract price is fixed in contract where end user releasing the PO should not change unit price.

2. contract price is based on markup price and end user should be able to change price to match the market price.

 

Appreciate your prompt advise.

 

Thanks & Regards

entry.title: SAP Sapphire Orlando 2025: Enhancing User Experience with SAP Fiori and AI – ERP1612
entry.content:
Like many of you, I’m excited to attend SAP Sapphire this year. As part of the SAP UX Foundation team, we have been focusing on bringing new capabilities to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, both in My Home, the relatively new starting page for SAP S/4HANA, as well as the individual SAP Fiori apps. Since we build the SAP Fiori elements framework, the AI innovations we deliver apply across all the SAP Fiori apps that SAP ships in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

My Session on SAP Fiori and AI

This year, I will be speaking about Enhancing User Experience with SAP Fiori and AI in session ERP1612, on Tuesday, May 20 from 11:00 AM - 11:40 AM EDT

I’m excited about this session because I will be able to share several new AI innovations in SAP Fiori that make the user experience even more intuitive and let people accomplish more in less time with less training on SAP. I will show demos of released versions that are generally available today in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

In addition to the usual slides, I will include some interactive polling so you can see how you compare to peers in terms of SAP Fiori adoption, AI usage, and what development tools you use in your organization. There will be live demos and some other surprises, along with a comprehensive list of resources for you to upskill on SAP Fiori and related technologies.

What you will learn in session 1612 Enhancing User Experience with SAP Fiori and AI

  1. How SAP Fiori is on the critical path to obtaining the benefits of AI in your organization
  2. How AI will simplify how users interact with SAP apps
  3. How AI will transform application development
  4. Different options on how to fit SAP Fiori into your work flows
  5. How to get started with SAP Fiori to accelerate your journey to a better UX

If you are not running SAP Fiori on every SAP screen across every business process, why not? This session will cover how to accelerate your SAP Fiori journey wherever you are starting. I’ll cover the topic from both the business user and IT perspective. There will be time for you to ask questions about your specific SAP Fiori adoption challenges.

Other related sessions on UX and AI that I recommend

There are many other great sessions at SAP Sapphire about user experience, business AI, and moving to SAP S/4HANA. Here is a list that I compiled with the ones I find most compelling from a large selection of amazing content.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/ux-ai-sap-s-4hana-transformation-sessions-at-sap-sapphire-and-asug-annual/ba-p/14068806

Help me focus my talk on your UX transformation needs

What issues are holding you back from SAP Fiori adoption at your organization? Please let me know in the comments and I’ll include answers in my talk.
To get the conversation started, please answer the multiple choice questions below. (For example: 1A, 1B, 1D, 2B, 2D, 2F)

Question 1: How have you deployed SAP Fiori in your organization?
Pick all that apply:

  • 1A) Using out of the box SAP Fiori apps from SAP
  • 1B) Using adapted SAP Fiori apps
  • 1C) Using custom SAP Fiori apps that we build ourselves
  • 1D) Using custom SAP Fiori apps that a partner / consultant built for us
  • 1E) Using SAP Fiori theme on classic apps
  • 1F) Not using SAP Fiori yet

Question 2: What tools and technologies are you using to build SAP Fiori apps?
Pick all that apply:

  • 2A) SAPUI5
  • 2B) SAP Fiori elements
  • 2C) SAP Fiori tools
  • 2D) SAP Build Code
  • 2E) SAP Screen Personas
  • 2F) Joule
  • 2G) CAP
  • 2H) RAP

Subscribe to these related community managed tags to remain informed about SAP Fiori and related topics

SAP Fiori elements
SAP Fiori tools
SAPUI5
SAP Build Code

Visit these community topic pages to learn more about ongoing innovations

SAP Fiori
SAP Fiori elements
SAP Fiori tools
SAPUI5
SAP Build Code

Hope to see you at Sapphire.

entry.title: #SITSAL2025 - 🗣️O Futuro da Logística Operacional com SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Aline Damaceno: O Futuro da Logística Operacional com SAP S4HANA

Palestrante

Aline Damaceno é consultora funcional SAP com especialização nos módulos MM, WM e ABAP. Com formação prática sólida, ela iniciou sua trajetória com o sistema TOTVS, migrando depois para o SAP, onde atua há mais de cinco anos. Atualmente trabalha em um centro de distribuição e é fundadora do canal “Aline Explica SAP”, voltado ao ensino didático e acessível de SAP no Instagram e LinkedIn. É reconhecida por democratizar o acesso ao conhecimento técnico com foco nos profissionais da linha de frente.

Título da Palestra

O Futuro da Logística Operacional com SAP S4HANA

Principais Pontos da Palestra

A palestra de Aline Damaceno no #SITSAL2025 oferece uma visão direta e prática sobre os avanços tecnológicos e os desafios da logística operacional com SAP S4HANA, especialmente no contexto brasileiro.

  1. Do ECC ao S4HANA Cloud

Aline traça a evolução do SAP desde o ECC até o S4HANA, enfatizando que o futuro da logística está na automação e na nuvem. Com atualizações trimestrais e dashboards integrados, o S4HANA permite decisões em tempo real e otimiza recursos como espaço, tempo e mão de obra.

  1. O Papel Central do EWM

O Extended Warehouse Management (EWM) não é mais um módulo separado como no ECC; ele vem embutido no S4HANA. Isso simplifica integrações e reduz custos. A automação de tarefas, o gerenciamento de exceções e a contagem cíclica de inventário tornam os processos mais estratégicos e menos operacionais.

  1. Interface Fiori: Uma Nova Experiência

Aline destaca os contrastes entre o SAP GUI tradicional e a interface Fiori. Embora o Fiori ofereça uma experiência mais intuitiva e amigável, a resistência de muitas empresas ainda é grande. Ela ilustra isso com experiências reais de treinamentos e dificuldades enfrentadas por usuários operacionais.

  1. Capacitação como Pilar da Transformação

Um dos pontos mais fortes da palestra é o apelo à capacitação contínua. Aline compartilha histórias de profissionais de chão de fábrica que, com iniciativa própria, buscaram aprender SAP para não ficarem para trás. Ela ressalta que o conhecimento técnico, aliado ao comportamento proativo, é decisivo para manter-se no mercado.

  1. Realidade dos Centros de Distribuição no Brasil

Com uma visão clara da logística nacional, Aline pontua que o Brasil, por suas dimensões continentais, exige um sistema robusto e dinâmico de distribuição. O SAP S4HANA, com seu poder analítico e capacidade de integração, é visto como o caminho para lidar com demandas crescentes de e-commerce e entregas ágeis.

  1. Integração com TM e MM

A necessidade de integrar corretamente os módulos TM (Transportation Management) e MM (Material Management) é abordada em detalhe. Sem dados mestres bem alimentados, as integrações falham, e Aline mostra como isso pode causar gargalos em processos logísticos e devoluções.

  1. Inventário e Exceções

A automação do inventário é fundamental, mas continua sendo uma dor para muitas empresas. Aline mostra como o monitor do EWM pode ajudar, especialmente em ambientes com alto volume de movimentações, como centros de distribuição farmacêuticos.

Conclusão

A palestra de Aline Damaceno vai além de um tutorial técnico — ela oferece um panorama humanizado, realista e inspirador sobre como a logística e o SAP estão transformando o cenário corporativo. Profissionais de qualquer nível técnico podem se beneficiar das ideias, ferramentas e conselhos compartilhados. Para quem busca inovação e crescimento na carreira, esse conteúdo é um excelente ponto de partida.
